title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma…) with a single CLI or Docker run; features model library, REST/OpenAI-compatible API, GPU/CPU fallback.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and async SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with 5 lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter giving chat, completion, embeddings and tool-calling nodes via Ollama.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama: chat threads, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoint, file uploads, RAG.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Experimental repo showing how to expose custom Python functions as tools that LLMs served by Ollama can call.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB; ingest PDFs and query from CLI.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Visual Studio Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local Copilot with inline autocomplete and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI (text UI) for Ollama written in Go; fuzzy-find models, syntax-highlighted chat, keybindings like vim.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models; macOS/Windows/Linux builds available.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to run and chat with Ollama models inside buffers; supports selection-to-prompt and streaming responses.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset—use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container and exposes it to your CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node-selector and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-chat-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that connects to local Ollama; features session memory, model picker, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that proxies chats to your Ollama instance; supports group threads, /system prompts, and per-user rate limits.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous and async APIs, Jackson models, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing typed wrappers over Ollama’s REST API with Tokio async support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot bringing Ollama models to servers via slash commands; supports threads, system prompts and model swapping.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Curated collection of community Modelfiles for specialized tasks (code, role-play, JSON, function-calling) ready to pull.
